title: scan_advances_tip: TOCTOU race on tip assertion
description: In testnet_scan_advances_tip (e2e_testnet.rs line 255-285), the chain tip is fetched once at line 255, then scan_to_tip() runs against the live testnet. If a new block arrives during the scan, new_tip > tip (the original snapshot), causing the strict equality assert_eq!(new_tip, tip) to fail spuriously. The assertion should use >= not == to tolerate new blocks arriving during scan.
